title: Scaling up the circular economy
summary_en: Engineers at WashU are addressing the challenges of scaling up CO2 electrolysis.

title: New residence hall to be named James E. and Clara P. McLeod House
summary_en: The late James McLeod, vice chancellor for students and dean of WashU Arts & Sciences, founded the Ervin Scholars Program and, along with his wife, Clara, challenged the WashU community to know each student “by name and by story.”
title_cn: 新宿舍楼将以詹姆斯·E·麦克劳德与克拉拉·P·麦克劳德夫妇命名
summary_cn: 华盛顿大学于4月27日在哈比森楼为克拉拉·麦克劳德举办招待会，校长安德鲁·D·马丁在会上宣布，南40区新建宿舍楼将被命名为“詹姆斯·E·与克拉拉·P·麦克劳德楼”，以纪念已故分管学生事务副校长兼文理学院院长詹姆斯·麦克劳德及其夫人克拉拉对大学的持久贡献。马丁指出，麦克劳德夫妇塑造了华盛顿大学的品格，其倡导“以姓名与故事了解每位学生”的理念至今仍激励着学生事务部及全体教职员工的工作。

title: Arvin appointed executive vice chancellor for advancement
summary_en: Will Arvin, vice chancellor for medical advancement at Washington University in St. Louis, has been appointed executive vice chancellor for advancement, effective Jan. 5, according to Chancellor Andrew D. Martin. Arvin will succeed Pamella A. Henson, who is retiring.
title_cn: 威尔·阿尔文被任命为圣路易斯华盛顿大学发展事务执行副校长
summary_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学校长安德鲁·D·马丁宣布，现任该校医学发展副校长威尔·阿尔文被任命为发展事务执行副校长，任命自1月5日起生效。阿尔文将接替计划于1月4日退休的帕梅拉·A·亨森。此项人事任命旨在延续并强化该校在慈善捐赠、校友联络及合作伙伴关系建设等方面的发展战略，以支持华盛顿大学的使命与优先战略目标。

title: New clues to disease severity identified in alpha1-antitrypsin deficiency
summary_en: WashU Medicine researchers discovered a cellular mechanism that may protect some patients with a genetic lung condition from developing liver damage.
title_cn: 研究发现α1抗胰蛋白酶缺乏症疾病严重程度相关新线索

title: WashU to award seven honorary degrees during 165th Commencement
summary_en: WashU will confer seven honorary degrees during its 165th Commencement May 15. Here are the recipients.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学将在第165届毕业典礼上授予7项荣誉学位

title: Lee installed as inaugural Stickle professor
summary_en: Aaron Lee, MD, a nationally acclaimed vitreoretinal surgeon and leader in applying artificial intelligence to vision research and patient care, has been named the inaugural Arthur W. Stickle Distinguished Professor of Ophthalmology and Visual Sciences at WashU Medicine.
title_cn: 亚伦·Y·李就任华盛顿大学医学院首任阿瑟·W·斯蒂克尔眼科学与视觉科学杰出教授

title: Henson to retire as executive vice chancellor for university advancement
summary_en: Pamella A. Henson, executive vice chancellor for university advancement, will retire Jan. 4, concluding a distinguished career spanning 34 years at WashU and 40 years in the profession, according to Chancellor Andrew D. Martin.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学主管大学发展事务执行副校长帕梅拉·A·汉森即将退休
